title: LeMieux Elite Pro Grooming Bag Black
features: Perfect for around the yard or taking to a show
Numerous compartments inside to help keep all your grooming essentials neat and organised
Handy front zip pocket for easy access
description: Perfect for around the yard or taking to a show, the Elite Pro Grooming Bag features plenty of pockets for keeping grooming essentials organised. Go pro with the LeMieux Elite Pro Grooming Bag. Perfect for around the yard or taking to a show, the numerous compartments inside will keep your grooming essentials tidy and organised as well as a handy front zip pocket for easy access. A strong waterproof denier nylon outer and reinforced moulded base makes this robust whatever the mud. Comes with a choice of ergonomic grab handle and padded adjustable shoulder strap. Brushes sold separately.
